nasb.text: nor do you take into account that it is expedient for you that one man die for the people, and that the whole nation not perish.”

esv.text: Nor do you understand that it is better for you that one man should die for the people, not that the whole nation should perish.”

cnv.text: 也不去想想，一個人代替人民死，免得整個民族滅亡，這對你們是有益的。”

ccb.text: 你们没有认识到，祂一个人替众人死，而不是整个民族灭亡，对你们来说更好。”

csbs.text: 也不想一想，一个人替民众死，免得全民族灭亡，这对你们是有益处的。”
